sentence: 各国合作打击恐怖主义非常重要。
pinyin: Gè guó hézuò dǎjī kǒngbù zhǔyì fēicháng zhòngyào.
english: It is very important for countries to cooperate in fighting terrorism.

sentence: 全球化让我们更容易买到外国商品。
pinyin: Quánqiúhuà ràng wǒmen gèng róngyì mǎi dào wàiguó shāngpǐn.
english: Globalization makes it easier for us to buy foreign goods.

sentence: 首届社区运动会吸引了很多居民。
pinyin: Shǒu jiè shèqū yùndònghuì xīyǐn le hěn duō jūmín.
english: The first community sports meet attracted many residents.

sentence: 士兵们服从将令，迅速撤退。
pinyin: Shìbīngmen fúcóng jiānglìng, xùnsù chètuì.
english: The soldiers obeyed the military order and retreated quickly.

sentence: 她买票去参加今年的电影节。
pinyin: Tā mǎi piào qù cānjiā jīnnián de diànyǐng jié.
english: She bought tickets to attend this year's film festival.

meaning: running script; semicursive script (Chinese calligraphic style)
sentence: 他练了多年行书，写出来的字流畅又好看。
pinyin: Tā liàn le duō nián xíng shū, xiě chūlái de zì liúchàng yòu hǎokàn.
english: He has practiced running script calligraphy for many years, and his characters are fluid and beautiful.

sentence: 公司决定改组管理层，引入新的领导团队。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng gǎi zǔ guǎnlǐ céng, yǐnrù xīn de lǐngdǎo tuánduì.
english: The company decided to reshuffle its management and bring in a new leadership team.

sentence: 政府在郊区新建了几个居民点，缓解市区压力。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ zài jiāoqū xīn jiàn le jǐ gè jūmíndiǎn, huǎnjiě shìqū yālì.
english: The government built several new residential areas in the suburbs to ease pressure on the city center.

sentence: 这辆卡车装的是柴油机，油耗比较低。
pinyin: Zhè liàng kǎchē zhuāng de shì chái yóu jī, yóuhào bǐjiào dī.
english: This truck is fitted with a diesel engine, so fuel consumption is relatively low.

sentence: 她申请到了学校的奖学金。
pinyin: Tā shēn qǐng dào le xué xiào de jiǎng xué jīn.
english: She successfully applied for a scholarship from the school.

sentence: 这幅图案左右对称，很好看。
pinyin: Zhè fú tú'àn zuǒyòu duìchèn, hěn hǎokàn.
english: This pattern is symmetrical left and right—it looks great.

sentence: 我已经在网上订好了去北京的机票。
pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng zài wǎng shàng dìng hǎo le qù Běi jīng de jī piào.
english: I've already booked my plane ticket to Beijing online.

sentence: 台下的听众不停地鼓掌喝彩。
pinyin: Táixià de tīngzhòng bù tíng de gǔzhǎng hècǎi.
english: The audience below the stage kept applauding and cheering.

meaning: 1. the emperor; 2. Your majesty the emperor; 3. His imperial majesty
sentence: 剧里的皇上每天要处理很多奏折。
pinyin: Jù lǐ de huángshàng měitiān yào chǔlǐ hěn duō zòuzhé.
english: The emperor in the drama has to deal with many official memorials every day.

sentence: 一辆货车停在路边卸货。
pinyin: Yī liàng huò chē tíng zài lùbiān xiè huò.
english: A truck was parked on the side of the road unloading goods.

meaning: 1. to fund; 2. to put money into sth; 3. to invest
sentence: 他出资为社区修建了一条新路。
pinyin: Tā chūzī wèi shèqū xiūjiàn le yī tiáo xīn lù.
english: He funded the construction of a new road for the community.

meaning: to hinge on; to be decided by; to depend on
sentence: 结果取决于你的努力程度。
pinyin: Jié guǒ qǔ jué yú nǐ de nǔ lì chéng dù.
english: The outcome depends on how hard you work.

sentence: 他每周末都去公园打棒球。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōumò dōu qù gōngyuán dǎ bàngqiú.
english: He goes to the park to play baseball every weekend.

sentence: 那段历史中军阀之间争斗不断。
pinyin: Nà duàn lìshǐ zhōng jūnfá zhījiān zhēngdòu bùduàn.
english: During that period of history, warlords were constantly fighting each other.

sentence: 会议结束后双方发表了联合公报。
pinyin: Huìyì jiéshù hòu shuāngfāng fābiǎo le liánhé gōngbào.
english: After the meeting, both sides issued a joint communiqué.

sentence: 博物馆里展示了一把老式步枪。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnshì le yī bǎ lǎoshì bùqiāng.
english: The museum displayed an old-style rifle.

meaning: 1. to encrypt; 2. encryption; 3. to protect with a password
sentence: 记得给文件加密再发给对方。
pinyin: Jìde gěi wénjiàn jiāmì zài fā gěi duìfāng.
english: Remember to encrypt the file before sending it to them.

sentence: 这本书介绍了中国常见的鸟类。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū jièshào le Zhōngguó chángjiàn de niǎolèi.
english: This book introduces common birds found in China.

meaning: 1. recipient (of an award); 2. winner (in a competition)
sentence: 今年奖学金的得主是一名大一学生。
pinyin: Jīnnián jiǎngxuéjīn de dézhǔ shì yī míng dàyī xuéshēng.
english: This year's scholarship recipient is a first-year university student.

meaning: 1. to rebuild; 2. to transform (a building); 3. to refurbish
sentence: 他们把旧仓库改建成了咖啡馆。
pinyin: Tāmen bǎ jiù cāngkù gǎijiàn chéng le kāfēiguǎn.
english: They converted the old warehouse into a café.

sentence: 下雨天很难叫到小黄，要等很久。
pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān hěn nán jiào dào xiǎohuáng, yào děng hěn jiǔ.
english: On rainy days it's hard to get a cab; you have to wait a long time.

sentence: 这台电脑的数据处理速度很快。
pinyin: Zhè tái diànnǎo de shùjù chǔlǐ sùdù hěn kuài.
english: This computer's data processing speed is very fast.

sentence: 她首度登上这个舞台，表演完全超出大家预期。
pinyin: Tā shǒu dù dēngshàng zhège wǔtái, biǎoyǎn wánquán chāochū dàjiā yùqī.
english: It was her first time on this stage, and her performance completely exceeded everyone's expectations.

sentence: 做学问要实事求是，不能为了结论而歪曲事实。
pinyin: Zuò xuéwèn yào shíshì qiúshì, bù néng wèile jiélùn ér wāiqū shìshí.
english: Academic work requires seeking truth from facts — you can't distort the facts to fit a conclusion.

sentence: 他放弃了金融行业，回家投身实业，办了一家工厂。
pinyin: Tā fàngqì le jīnróng hángyè, huíjiā tóushēn shí yè, bàn le yī jiā gōngchǎng.
english: He gave up finance, went back home, threw himself into industry, and started a factory.

sentence: 医生用激光治疗他的眼部问题。
pinyin: Yīshēng yòng jīguāng zhìliáo tā de yǎnbù wèntí.
english: The doctor used a laser to treat his eye problem.

sentence: 过马路的时候要注意安全。
pinyin: Guò mǎlù de shíhou yào zhùyì ānquán.
english: Be careful when crossing the road.

sentence: 这次比赛只有十个名额，竞争很激烈。
pinyin: Zhè cì bǐsài zhǐ yǒu shí gè míng'é, jìngzhēng hěn jīliè.
english: There are only ten spots in this competition, so it's very competitive.

meaning: admittedly; it is true that; indeed;Conj no doubt, of course
sentence: 坐飞机固然快，但坐火车更便宜。
pinyin: Zuò fēijī gùrán kuài, dàn zuò huǒchē gèng piányí.
english: Flying is admittedly fast, but taking the train is cheaper.

meaning: 1. midnight; 2. in the middle of the night
sentence: 邻居家的狗半夜一直叫，把我吵醒了。
pinyin: Línjū jiā de gǒu bànyè yīzhí jiào, bǎ wǒ chǎoxǐng le.
english: The neighbor's dog kept barking in the middle of the night and woke me up.

sentence: 前台通知我有客户来访，请我下楼接待。
pinyin: Qián tái tōng zhī wǒ yǒu kè hù lái fǎng, qǐng wǒ xià lóu jiē dài.
english: The front desk notified me that a client had come to visit and asked me to go downstairs to receive them.

meaning: 1. auto race; 2. cycle race; 3. race car
sentence: 他从小就喜欢看赛车比赛。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù xǐ huān kàn sài chē bǐ sài.
english: He has loved watching car races since he was a child.

meaning: 1. to engage; 2. to hire (a lawyer etc)
sentence: 公司聘请了一位经验丰富的顾问。
pinyin: Gōng sī pìn qǐng le yī wèi jīng yàn fēng fù de gù wèn.
english: The company hired an experienced consultant.

sentence: 她的做事态度是大家学习的典范。
pinyin: Tā de zuòshì tàidù shì dàjiā xuéxí de diǎnfàn.
english: Her attitude toward work is a model for everyone to learn from.

sentence: 新冰箱很节能，电费少了很多。
pinyin: Xīn bīngxiāng hěn jiénéng, diànfèi shǎo le hěn duō.
english: The new fridge is very energy-efficient — the electricity bill dropped a lot.

meaning: 1. market price; 2. quotation of market price; 3. the current market s
sentence: 最近股市行情不太好。
pinyin: Zuìjìn gǔshì hángqíng bù tài hǎo.
english: The stock market situation hasn't been great lately.

meaning: 1. to mediate; 2. to bring parties to an agreement
sentence: 邻居吵架，物业出面调解了一下。
pinyin: Línjū chǎojià, wùyè chūmiàn tiáo jiě le yīxià.
english: The neighbors were arguing, so the property management stepped in to mediate.

meaning: source (of a product); place of origin; manufacturing location
sentence: 这种苹果的产地是新疆。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng píng guǒ de chǎn dì shì Xīn jiāng.
english: The place of origin for this type of apple is Xinjiang.

sentence: 他把那块手表当作生日礼物送给了我。
pinyin: Tā bǎ nà kuài shǒubiǎo dāngzuò shēngrì lǐwù sòng gěi le wǒ.
english: He gave me that watch as a birthday gift.

sentence: 社会应该严惩强暴犯罪行为。
pinyin: Shèhuì yīnggāi yán chéng qiángbào fànzuì xíngwéi.
english: Society should severely punish violent criminal behavior.

meaning: 1. entire book; 2. unabridged book; 3. entire multi-volume work; 4. co
sentence: 他用两周时间读完了全书。
pinyin: Tā yòng liǎng zhōu shíjiān dú wán le quánshū.
english: He finished reading the entire book in two weeks.

sentence: 多国联合开展了一次反恐演习。
pinyin: Duō guó liánhé kāizhǎn le yīcì fǎnkǒng yǎnxí.
english: Several countries jointly conducted an anti-terrorism drill.

meaning: 1. war zone; 2. combat zone; 3. (military) theater of operations
sentence: 记者进入战区前必须穿防弹衣。
pinyin: Jìzhě jìnrù zhànqū qián bìxū chuān fángdàn yī.
english: Journalists must wear bulletproof vests before entering the war zone.

sentence: 这个案例很有代表性，值得研究。
pinyin: Zhège ànlì hěn yǒu dàibiǎoxìng, zhídé yánjiū.
english: This case is very representative and worth studying.

meaning: 1. specialized subject; 2. branch (of medicine); 3. specialized traini
sentence: 她在专科医院看了皮肤科。
pinyin: Tā zài zhuānkē yīyuàn kàn le pífū kē.
english: She saw a dermatologist at a specialized hospital.
